A FINAL CONTINUANCE FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE TO DEC-10-2020 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506 FOR PLAINTIFF TO PROVIDE EVIDENCE ABOUT WHETHER OR NOT THE HEATER IS DAMAGED. PLAINTIFF/CROSS DEFENDANT FITA PARTNERS LLC DBA KINDLE LIVING IS PRESENT VIA TELEPHONIC APPEARANCE, REPRESENTED BY DAVID TANNENBAUM, OWNER. DEFENDANT/CROSS COMPLAINANT RAJ KHOKHA IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF/CROSS DEFENDANT AND DEFENDANT/CROSS COMPLAINANT TO ACT IN GOOD FAITH TO COORDINATE THE INSPECTION, WHICH MUST BE COMPLETED NO LATER THAN NEXT HEARING DATE. IF THERE IS FAILURE BY PLAINTIFF/CROSS DEFENDANT TO TIMELY PRESENT THE ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE, THROUGH NO FAULT OF DEFENDANT/CROSS COMPLAINANT, THEN ON SAID NEXT HEARING DATE JUDGMENT SHALL BE ENTERED IN FAVOR OF DEFENDANT/CROSS COMPLAINANT FOR A FULL REFUND, INCLUDING HIS INITIAL DEPOSIT, IN ADDITION TO ANY COURT COST IN BRINGING HIS CROSS-COMPLAINT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. COMMISSIONER: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
